article_summary: This guide provides a comprehensive upper body routine for women, focusing on building strength and muscle tone using accessible equipment like dumbbells. It outlines specific exercises for the chest, back, shoulders, and arms, emphasizing proper form and consistency.
article_title: Upper Body Workout for Women: 10 Best Exercises

images.caption: Building upper body strength is about empowerment and functional health.

images.image_prompt: Low-angle medium shot of a woman in her 30s with a focused expression, wearing high-quality sage green athletic wear, holding two silver dumbbells at her sides. Color palette of muted earth tones and whites. Photorealistic, editorial photography style.
images.purpose: To set an aspirational and empowering tone for the workout guide.
